title: Automatisch
description: Open-source business automation tool (a self-hostable Zapier alternative) for connecting apps and building no-code integration workflows.
installation: Automatisch is a multi-service stack. This template runs the main web/API server from automatischio/automatisch on port 3000. It REQUIRES a companion WORKER service: deploy a second app with the SAME image (automatischio/automatisch), the SAME environment variables PLUS WORKER=true, and the same Postgres + Redis connection settings -- the worker runs the background queues that actually execute your flows, so without it nothing fires. It needs two operator add-ons (Postgres + Valkey/Redis, both provisioned here). ROTATE before exposing: ENCRYPTION_KEY, WEBHOOK_SECRET_KEY, and APP_SECRET_KEY (generate each with `openssl rand -base64 36`) plus the Postgres add-on password. On first start the server runs DB migrations and seeds the admin user; the default login is created from the docker env or the install wizard -- check the docs and change the admin password immediately. Set HOST/PROTOCOL to match your public URL so OAuth redirect URIs and webhook URLs resolve correctly.
